wpr_custom_css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap'); #mg-wprm-wrap,#mg-wprm-wrap *{font-family:'Inter',sans-serif!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#0f172a 0%,#1e3a5f 100%)!important;} #wprmenu_bar{background:#1e3a8a!important;box-shadow:0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.4)!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a{letter-spacing:.08em;padding:14px 24px!important;border-left:3px solid transparent;transition:all .25s ease;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a:hover,#mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li.current-menu-item>a{border-left-color:#38bdf8!important;background:rgba(56,189,248,.08)!important;color:#38bdf8!important;} .wprm_before_menu_content{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1e3a8a,#0f172a);padding:28px 24px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,.2);} .wprm_before_menu_content h4{color:#38bdf8;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;margin:10px 0 4px;} .wprm_before_menu_content span.sub{color:#94a3b8;font-size:12px;display:block;} .wpr_social_icons{padding:14px 24px;border-top:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,.15);display:flex;gap:10px;} .wpr_social_icons a{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(56,189,248,.1);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:background .2s;} .wpr_social_icons a:hover{background:rgba(56,189,248,.25);}
